tutorial.welcome_desc: The simple tool to export your Snapchat memories in one click.
tutorial.export_data_desc: To use the application, you will need to request your data on the Snapchat website.
tutorial.step1_desc: You must export the following information:
tutorial.step2_desc: Once options are selected, choose 'from the beginning' to export ALL your memories.
tutorial.what_next_desc: Once the email address is filled in, wait a few minutes ⏱️ You will receive an email when the export is complete.
tutorial.received_mail_desc: Great! Now you just need to:
tutorial.received_mail_item1: Download the first file generated by Snapchat
tutorial.received_mail_item2: Select this ZIP file on the 'Snapchat Archive (.zip)' button

upload.tooltip_folder: Choose where your memories will be downloaded on your computer.
upload.tooltip_zip: Select the .zip archive of your Snapchat export. The application will automatically look for the 'memories_history.json' file.
upload.tooltip_merge: The default Snapchat export format separates text from media. Selecting this option will merge the relevant files to get a single file.
upload.reset_confirm_desc: This action will stop the current export and start over from the beginning.
upload.reset_confirm_warning: All previously downloaded files will be deleted.

history.error_explanation: These files could not be downloaded. This can happen if the link has expired or if your connection was cut off.

health.backend_slow: The backend seems to be taking time to start or encountered an error.
